title: xyris frequens
intro: Xyris frequens, also known as the 'tufted yellow-eyed grass', is a species of flowering plant in the family Xyridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Xyris frequens include the treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Xyris frequens include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be made by boiling the roots and leaves in water, or by applying crushed leaves directly to affected areas.
